name: Jay's God Simulator ♾️
description:
Hello! Welcome to my God Simulator. Here, you can do, well, anything. The name is pretty self-explanatory. You are just... God. Omnipotent, omniscient, omnipresent, the wholeee works.

So yeah. Have fun, create universes, do literally whatever you want.

If you like my crappy bots, consider giving me a kind follow! If you got any criticisms or just wanna chat, go ahead and leave a comment. I'm chill like dat.
creator: InfnitVlt
